/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -march=native -fPIC -O3 -ffast-math -fno-finite-math-only -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libspdlog.so.1.14 -o libspdlog.so.1.14.1 CMakeFiles/spdlog.dir/src/spdlog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/spdlog.dir/src/stdout_sinks.cpp.o CMakeFiles/spdlog.dir/src/color_sinks.cpp.o CMakeFiles/spdlog.dir/src/file_sinks.cpp.o CMakeFiles/spdlog.dir/src/async.cpp.o CMakeFiles/spdlog.dir/src/cfg.cpp.o CMakeFiles/spdlog.dir/cmake_device_link.o
